sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n24898" key="dia/kamyis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διάκαμψις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n24898.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bending,</tr_> of the body, in exercise, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Archig.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
